signals: TSMC domina manufactura avanzada con resultados récord y advierte sobre barreras de entrada extremas en fundición.
Google DeepMind acelera la robótica con razonamiento espacial mejorado en Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6.
Anthropic automatiza la investigación de alineación usando Claude Opus 4.6 para supervisar modelos futuros.
La carrera por la multimodalidad se vuelve masiva con modelos abiertos de razonamiento como Gemma 4.
NVIDIA impulsa la soberanía tecnológica europea mediante la construcción de infraestructura de inteligencia local.
risks: Complejidad exponencial en manufactura por debajo de 3nm desafía la Ley de Moore y los plazos de entrega.
Riesgos de alineación al delegar la supervisión de modelos IA potentes a otros sistemas automatizados.
Saturación de mercado en APIs de generación de medios con márgenes de beneficio cada vez más ajustados.
watch: Adopción real de Gemma 4 en flujos de trabajo de agentes autónomos.
Efectividad de Claude Opus 4.6 en la resolución de problemas de alineación débil-fuerte.
Impacto de la arquitectura 'intelligence infrastructure' en la inversión soberana europea.

items.title: TSMC to Elon Musk: There are no Shortcuts in Building Fabs!
items.summary: The opening of the TSMC 2026 earning call series brought no surprises. CC Wei has done more than 30 such calls since taking the CEO position in 2018 and he never fails to disappoint. Once again, CC Wei reported numbers above guidance driven by strong demand and flawless execution. This illustrates the benefit of TSMC’s close collaborations… Read More The post TSMC to Elon Musk: There are no Shortcuts in Building Fabs! appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: TSMC reporta resultados superiores a guías, confirmando su control total del mercado de chips avanzados y la dificultad de replicar sus fundiciones.

items.title: NVIDIA GauGAN2, a powerful [#AI](https://x.com/hashtag/AI?src=hashtag_click) model that allows anyone to convert simple written phrases like "ocean waves" in...
items.summary: NVIDIA GauGAN2, a powerful [#AI](https://x.com/hashtag/AI?src=hashtag_click) model that allows anyone to convert simple written phrases like "ocean waves" into a photorealistic masterpiece. items.title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6: Powering real-world robotics tasks through enhanced embodied reasoning
items.summary: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.
items.why: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 mejora significativamente el razonamiento espacial, clave para robots autónomos útiles en el mundo real.

items.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
items.summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.
items.why: Lanzamiento de Lyria 3 para creación musical, ampliando el ecosistema multimodal de Gemini.

items.title: New Anthropic Fellows research: developing an Automated Alignment Researcher. We ran an experiment to learn whether Claude Opus 4.6 could accelerate research...
items.summary: New Anthropic Fellows research: developing an Automated Alignment Researcher. We ran an experiment to learn whether Claude Opus 4.6 could accelerate research on a key alignment problem: using a weak AI model to supervise the training of a stronger one.
items.why: Anthropic usa Claude Opus 4.6 para supervisión débil-fuerte, un paso crítico hacia la alineación automatizada de modelos sobrehumanos.

items.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
items.summary: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.
items.why: Gemma 4 redefine el estado del arte en modelos abiertos optimizados para razonamiento avanzado y agentes.

items.title: It’s a Sign: AI Platform for Teaching American Sign Language Aims to Bridge Communication Gaps
items.summary: American Sign Language is the third most prevalent language in the United States — but there are vastly fewer AI tools developed with ASL data than data representing the country’s most common languages, English and Spanish. NVIDIA, the American Society for Deaf Children and creative agency Hello Monday are helping close this gap with Signs, […]
items.why: Uso de IA para reducir la brecha de comunicación en lengua de signos americana.

items.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
items.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
items.why: Nano Banana 2 ofrece generación de imágenes de alta fidelidad con latencia mínima, optimizando el despliegue comercial.

items.title: Grok's Speech to Text API is now available. Instant, multi-speaker transcription across 25 languages - at the best price in the market.
items.summary: Grok's Speech to Text API is now available. Instant, multi-speaker transcription across 25 languages - at the best price in the market.
items.why: xAI entra en el mercado de transcripción con precios agresivos y soporte multi-idioma para Grok.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
items.summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.

items.why: Integración nativa de prompts de IA en el navegador para democratizar herramientas de productividad de un clic.

items.why: Veo 3.1 Lite reduce el coste de entrada para la generación de vídeo de alta calidad mediante modelos más eficientes.

items.title: NVIDIA CEO Drops the Blueprint for Europe’s AI Boom
items.summary: At GTC Paris — held alongside VivaTech, Europe’s largest tech event — NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang delivered a clear message: Europe isn’t just adopting AI — it’s building it. “We now have a new industry, an AI industry, and it’s now part of the new infrastructure, called intelligence infrastructure, that will be used […]
items.why: Jensen Huang promueve la 'soberanía de inteligencia' en Europa como motor de una nueva industria de infraestructura tecnológica.
